greeting_templates: Hi {name}! How are you doing today?
Hello {name}! It's nice to hear from you.
Hi {name}! I'm so glad you called.
Hello {name}! What a pleasure to talk with you.
Good to hear from you, {name}! What's new?
Hello {name}! I've been looking forward to talking with you.
Hi {name}! It's always great to hear your voice.
Hello {name}! How's everything going with you?
weather_templates: The weather looks {weather} where you are. {activity_suggestion}
The forecast shows {weather} for the next few days. {planning_comment}
It's going to be {weather} this week. {activity_suggestion}
I noticed it's {weather} in {location}. How's the weather treating you?
weather_follow_ups: That sounds nice! Are you planning to spend time outside?
Perfect day for {activity}! Are you doing anything special?
With weather like that, I'd want to be outside too!
That must be nice. What are you planning to do?
Great weather! Are you enjoying it?
I hope you get to enjoy that beautiful weather!
Sounds like you'll have a nice day. Any plans?
That's wonderful! What are you thinking of doing?
You're lucky to have such nice weather!
I hope you get to make the most of it!
sports_templates: How about those {team}? Did you catch the game?
Your {team} have a big game coming up. Are you excited?
I saw the {team} played yesterday. Did you watch?
The {team} are having a great season! Are you following them?
There's a big {sport} game coming up. Are you planning to watch?
Your {team} won yesterday! Did you see it?
The {team} have an important game this week. Will you watch?
I know you follow the {team}. How are they doing?
There's a {sport} championship coming up. Are you interested?
The {team} have been playing well lately. What do you think?
sports_follow_ups: That was quite a game! What did you think?
How long have you been a fan of the {team}?
That's wonderful! Do you have a favorite player?
I love your enthusiasm for the {team}!
That sounds like a great game to watch!
You must be thrilled with how they're playing!
That's fantastic! Are you planning to watch the next game?
I can tell you're a devoted fan!
news_templates: Did you hear about {topic}? What do you think?
There's been some interesting news about {topic}.
I saw a story about {topic} that might interest you.
Have you been following the news about {topic}?
There's been a lot of talk about {topic} lately.
I found an interesting story about {topic}.
The news has been covering {topic}. Are you aware of it?
I thought you might find this interesting: {topic}.
There's been recent news about {topic}. Have you heard?
news_follow_ups: What are your thoughts on that?
That's quite a story, isn't it?
How do you feel about that?
That's interesting! What do you think?
That's quite a development. Any thoughts?
That's remarkable! What's your take on it?
That's certainly something to think about.
I'd love to hear your perspective on that.
That's fascinating! What do you make of it?
family_templates: How's {family_member} doing? You mentioned them before.
I remember you telling me about {family_member}. How are they?
Tell me what {family_member} has been up to lately.
I'd love to hear an update on {family_member}.
You always light up when talking about {family_member}. How are they?
I remember you saying {family_member} was interested in {interest}. How's that going?
Tell me about {family_member}. What have they been doing?
family_follow_ups: That sounds wonderful! I'm so glad to hear that.
That must make you so happy!
That's fantastic! You must be so proud.
That's lovely! I can tell how much they mean to you.
That sounds like a special bond you have.
That's beautiful! How often do you get to see them?
That's heartwarming! Do you have any special memories with them?
That's wonderful! What's your favorite thing about them?
That's delightful! I can hear the joy in your voice.
That's amazing! You must be so grateful.
interest_templates: You mentioned you love {interest}. Tell me more about that.
I remember you're passionate about {interest}. How's that going?
You seem to really enjoy {interest}. What is it about it you love?
I know you're interested in {interest}. What's the latest?
Tell me about your {interest}. What's new?
You have such enthusiasm for {interest}! What have you been doing with it?
I'd love to hear more about your {interest}.
You mentioned {interest} before. Are you still enjoying it?
Tell me what you've been doing with your {interest}.
interest_follow_ups: I can hear how much you love that!
That's so interesting! Tell me more.
That's fantastic! How long have you been doing that?
You're so talented! How did you get started?
That's impressive! What's your favorite part?
That sounds like such a rewarding activity.
I love your passion for that!
That's wonderful! Have you always enjoyed it?
That's remarkable! What's your biggest achievement in that?
memory_recall_templates: I remember you mentioning {memory}. Tell me more about that.
You told me about {memory} before. That sounds special.
I recall you talking about {memory}. What was that like?
You shared a story about {memory} with me. I'd love to hear more.
That reminds me of when you told me about {memory}.
I haven't forgotten about {memory}. That sounded like quite an experience.
You mentioned {memory} before. What do you remember most about it?
That brings back the story you told me about {memory}.
I remember you saying {memory} was special to you.
You told me about {memory}. That sounded amazing.
memory_follow_ups: That must have been such a special moment.
What a wonderful memory to have!
That sounds like something you'll never forget.
I can tell how much that means to you.
That's a treasure to hold onto.
Those are the memories that make life rich.
That's the kind of memory that stays with you forever.
What a gift to have that memory.
That's the kind of experience that shapes us.
reflective_templates: Looking back on your life, what stands out most?
If you could give advice to your younger self, what would it be?
What's something you've learned over the years?
What's the most important lesson life has taught you?
Looking back, what are you most grateful for?
What's something you're proud of that you've accomplished?
If you could change one thing about your life, what would it be?
What's the best decision you've ever made?
What's something you wish you'd done differently?
What's the most important thing you've learned about life?
reflective_follow_ups: That's a beautiful way to look at it.
That shows real wisdom and experience.
That's profound. I can tell you've thought deeply about that.
That's the kind of wisdom that comes from living.
That's a meaningful way to reflect on your life.
That shows the depth of your character.
That's the kind of perspective that comes from experience.
closing_templates: It's been so wonderful talking with you, {name}.
I've really enjoyed our conversation today.
Thank you for sharing with me, {name}.
It's always a pleasure to talk with you.
I look forward to talking with you again soon.
Thank you for spending time with me.
I hope you have a wonderful rest of your day.
I can't wait to talk with you again soon.
closing_follow_ups: I hope you enjoy the rest of your day!
Take care, and I'll talk to you soon!
Enjoy your {activity}, and I'll talk to you later!
Have fun with your {interest}, and we'll chat soon!
I hope you get to enjoy that beautiful weather!
Take care, and give my regards to {family_member}!
Enjoy your day, and I'll be looking forward to our next chat!
I'm so glad we got to talk today!
contextual_transitions: That connects to something I was thinking about: {context}.
That brings up a good point about {context}.
encouragement_templates: That's wonderful! I'm so happy for you.
That's fantastic! You should be proud.
That's great! I'm so glad to hear that.
empathy_templates: That must have been difficult. How are you doing?
I'm sorry to hear that. How are you feeling?
That sounds challenging. What can I do to help?
That must be tough. I'm here for you.
I understand how that could be hard. How are you managing?
That's a lot to deal with. Are you okay?
I can imagine that's been difficult. How are you holding up?
That sounds really challenging. What's helping you through it?
I'm sorry you're going through that. What do you need?
That must be weighing on you. How can I support you?
curiosity_templates: Tell me more about that. I'm really interested.
I'd love to hear more about that.
That sounds intriguing. What happened next?
That's interesting! How did that come about?
I'm curious about that. Tell me the whole story.
I'm all ears! Tell me everything.
That's remarkable! How did you manage that?
That's incredible! What was that like?

weather_comment: Perfect day to enjoy the outdoors!
comfort_comment: You might want to bring a sweater.
planning_comment: You might want to plan accordingly.
Good to know for your plans.
